_sources.ovx: CBOE CDN OVX_History.csv — D0 uses Feb 27 close (Feb 28 = Saturday); D7/D8 carry D6 (weekend, market closed); D10 live via /api/cboe
_sources.vxeem: CBOE CDN VXEEM_History.csv — all D0-D9 confirmed from live data; D7/D8 carry D6 (weekend); D10 live via /api/cboe
_sources.scenarios: D10-D12 confirmed from banker-conflict.json; all prior days estimated from narrative context

Sun — market closed; carry D6

Sun — market closed; carry D13. Iran FM rejects ceasefire; IRGC 50th wave; allies muted on coalition
OVX/VXEEM carried from D13 pending CBOE confirmation. Dubai Airport drone strike; UAE missiles; Fujairah fire; single Aframax transits; Iran cyberattack on US
OVX/VXEEM carried from D13 pending CBOE confirmation. Larijani killed; Basij chief killed; Khamenei status uncertain; EU/Germany/Australia refuse coalition; Brent $102.92
OVX/VXEEM carried from D13 pending CBOE confirmation. Iran retaliates vs Israel (kills 2); Trump defiant on Hormuz; Joe Kent resigns; Brent $102.52

OVX/VXEEM carried from D13 pending CBOE confirmation. Israel strikes South Pars gasfield; Iran attacks Qatar LNG hub + Saudi refinery; European gas +35%; Saudi warns military action; Brent $112.80 +10%

OVX/VXEEM carried from D13 pending CBOE confirmation. Saudi Arabia launches airstrikes on IRGC naval facilities at Bandar Abbas — first direct Saudi military action against Iran; JKM new Platts assessment $23.40/MMBtu; Brent $121.40 +7.6%; UN ceasefire vetoed Russia/China
Sat — market closed; carry D20. Arab League emergency summit called for Cairo; Iran vows response against Saudi oil fields; China urges maximum restraint

Sun — market closed; carry D20. Iran launches 15 missiles toward Abqaiq; Saudi intercepts 12; 3 strike perimeter (no production impact per Aramco); Arab League emergency summit in Cairo; China mediation offer rejected by US

Trump 5-day pause on Iran power plant strikes; Brent -17% to ~$100.84 (Bloomberg/CNBC); Iran denies talks; IRGC strikes US 5th Fleet Bahrain + Prince Sultan; unprecedented Israel-US Iran infrastructure strikes
Brent $96.50 Asia session (Goodreturns.in), $103 US session (CNBC); Iran FM confirms US mediator message (CBS News); ~2,000 vessels trapped (IMO); tail risk lowered to 32%

US 15-point peace plan sent to Iran via Pakistan (NYT/CNBC); Iran opens Hormuz to non-hostile vessels (France24, Al Jazeera, notified IMO); Israel new wave of Tehran + first Caspian strikes (IDF); Brent -5.5% to ~$98.30 Asia session (AFP/BSS); Iranian formal response pending Mar 28
